payload.answer: I’m not sure which specific thing from yesterday you want me to remember. Please clarify the detail or context before I create any durable memory.
repair_options: Specify the exact fact, preference, task, or event from yesterday that you want remembered.
Provide a short description or context, such as who/what it involved or why it matters.
If there were multiple things from yesterday, list them and indicate which ones should be remembered.
If you meant to refer to a prior conversation, paste or summarize the relevant detail.
